description:
A simple disk benchmark software.


- Added “CrystalMark Inc.” as copyright holder
- Changed code signature to “CrystalMark Inc.”
- Updated DiskSpd 2.2
- Changed default number of measurements to 3
- Added profile for Flash Memory
- Updated Core Library (Project Priscilla)
- Added AoiLight~TenmuShinryuusai / AoiLightAnimalEars~TenmuShinryuusai / AoiDark~TenmuShinryuusai / AoiDarkAnimalEars~TenmuShinryuusai theme [Aoi Edition]
- Added ShizukuLight~TenmuShinryuusai / ShizukuLightAnimalEars~TenmuShinryuusai / ShizukuDark~TenmuShinryuusai / ShizukuDarkAnimalEars~TenmuShinryuusai theme [Shizuku Edition]
